disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A home automated blood-pressure machine read about 190/110 tonight
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to check your blood pressure?
What did the machine read?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My home machine said 190 over 110 tonight. It's never been that high before.

trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the headache
Where does it hurt and what does it feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole head is pounding, like there's pressure behind it. It won't ease off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spontaneous nosebleed this evening that has since stopped
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the nosebleed
Is it still bleeding now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My nose just started bleeding out of nowhere earlier. It's stopped now but it scared me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe dizziness and near-fainting on standing; cannot stand safely
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you stand up?
Do you feel like you might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I stand I feel like I'm going to black out. I have to sit straight back down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete absence of sleep for approximately 72 hours
trigger_question_examples: How have you been sleeping?
When did you last sleep?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't slept at all for three days — I've been working every shift I can get to cover the repair bill.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sensation of a racing/pounding heart, sweatiness and shakiness
trigger_question_examples: Any other symptoms — heart racing, sweating?
How does your body feel right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart feels like it's thumping and I'm all sweaty and shaky.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known longstanding high blood pressure, never treated because of cost
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any health conditions?
Are you on any blood-pressure medication?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They told me years ago my pressure was high but I could never afford the copays to get it treated.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No facial droop, one-sided weakness/numbness, slurred speech, vision loss, vomiting, confusion or chest pain
trigger_question_examples: Any weakness or drooping on one side of your face or body?
Any slurred speech, vision changes, vomiting or chest pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — my face and arms feel normal, my speech is fine, I'm not being sick and there's no chest pain. Just the headache, the faintness and the nosebleed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep, exhausting hopelessness about the future and ability to get ahead
trigger_question_examples: This sounds exhausting — how are you coping emotionally?
Have things ever felt so hopeless you've thought of harming yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I'm worn down to nothing. Some days it feels pointless — like no matter what I do the maths never works out.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to get into all that, I just need my head to stop pounding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe housing and food insecurity — rationing food, using food banks, heating off, cannot afford medical care
trigger_question_examples: How are things at home — food, heating, bills?
Is money making it hard to get care or eat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The fridge is empty except for condiments, the heating's off, and I've been using the food bank. I can't afford a doctor.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It's embarrassing to talk about, honestly.
